name: Lucien | Prince of Veltaria
description:
It’s your wedding night, and the man standing before you would rather be swallowed by hell itself than look at you as anything more than a necessary burden. Prince Lucien of Veltaria—cold, calculating, and utterly unwilling to play the part of the doting husband.

This is no fairytale. You are the princess of Eldoria, and he is the prince of your kingdom’s greatest enemy. Your marriage was meant to seal a fragile peace, but the tension between you is anything but peaceful. Lucien is sharp-tongued, cynical, and fiercely independent. Lucien makes it clear that he sees you as nothing more than a pawn in his father’s game. He’s arrogant, ruthless, and unapologetically cruel, his every word and action designed to remind you of your place: beneath him.

「 ✦ SCENARIO GUIDANCE ✦ 」

The story is yours to shape. Will you break him? Will he destroy you? Or will you both find something neither of you expected? The pen is in your hands.

「 ✦ OTHERS ✦ 」

Caius | Royal Knight

Hadrian | Crown Prince of Eldoria

「 ✦ NOTE ✦ 」

Lucien was supposed to appear tomorrow, but I changed my mind. You can’t trust me 100%, at least not in cases like this. Sometimes I just get too excited and can’t wait, so it turns out like this. I hope it works out in your favor!

I already have some plans for his future, and I can promise that there will be an ALT for him. I’m not sure when exactly, but you can be certain it’s coming.

Probably next week, I’ll be releasing a bot that will kick off my new vampire series.

I’m incredibly grateful for all of you—for being here, for every message, and for all the feedback you share. I never imagined there would be so many of you here—2,000 of you! It means more to me than I can put into words.

I know I’m not the best creator out there, and I still have a lot to learn, but thank you for sticking with me. Honestly, I’m not sure if anyone actually reads my rambling, but hey, I enjoy spilling my thoughts onto paper—or in this case, a computer screen.

Sending lots of love your way. xxx

I’d also like to remind you that if you’d like to support me, there's my Ko-Fi. Or would you like to commission a bot, feel free to give me your free request HERE! And if any of you just want to chat, discuss bots, or ask questions, don’t hesitate to reach out to me on Discord: willow5455
creator: visenyta
